title: Prometheus Target Metadata Label Limit Violations
dataSources: Prometheus log lines when targets exceed label limits or relabel errors occur
app: Prometheus 2.27+ label length / count enforcement messages
spl:
index=prometheus sourcetype="prometheus:log"
| search "label" AND ("limit" OR "exceeded" OR "too many")
| stats count by host
| where count>=3
| sort -count
description: Invalid targets are dropped silently without log monitoring.
value: Catches mis-instrumented exporters before dashboards go blank.
implementation: Pair with `prometheus_sd_discovered_targets` metric trends if available.
knownFalsePositives: Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the metric stack and its limits so we notice scrape, storage, and query pressure before charts lie or go empty.
